description: A plain candid operational/press photograph with no graphic design overlay (only text is printed on the gear within the scene). Shot outdoors in daylight, it shows a smiling woman with long dark hair wearing a black ball cap with a gold badge emblem and an olive-green tactical plate carrier vest marked 'POLICE ICE' with an ICE/ERO badge patch and a Phoenix-style firebird patch; she stands among several armed officers in tactical gear (vests reading 'POLICE ICE'), one wearing sunglasses, with a marked SUV reading 'POLICE' and 'ICE' visible at right and trees and a building in the background. This corresponds to the tweet's mention of DHS Secretary Kristi Noem (@Sec_Noem) participating in a Phoenix-area enforcement operation; the woman appears to be Secretary Noem in ICE tactical attire. Faces of some officers appear blurred. Despite being a staged/photo-op image, there is no designed slogan, headline, or meme treatment, so it is documentary rather than a designed graphic.
notable_text: POLICE ICE (printed on vests); ICE (on vehicle)
